title: Error::check in wolftpm::error and wolftpm-tss::error are symmetric but separate
description: wolftpm::Error::check (maps rc→Tpm{rc}) and wolftpm_tss::Error::check (maps rc→Transport{code}) have identical structure but produce different error types. This is correct and intentional given the two error domains. However, wolftpm_tss::Error::check is pub(crate) while wolftpm::Error::check is pub — inconsistency with no stated reason. A future contributor may make one public by copying the other. Suggest documenting why wolftpm_tss::Error::check is crate-private.
